description:
ORTA SEVIYE MARKALAR - Icerik Zenginlestirme | 12 marka sayfasini iyilestir (mevcut ~1200-1500 bytedan 2000+ byte'a cikar)

Markalar:
- astral — AstralPool, havuz ekipmanlari lideri
- beser — su depolarinda uzman (baslik termostat diyor, kontrol)
- demirdokum — 1954, isitma, kombi, radyator
- eca — 35+ yil, isitma sogutma
- eds — pompa ve hidrofor
- element — rezistans, elektrikli isitma
- fronius — 1945 Avusturya, solar inverter
- general — Fujitsu General klima
- lg — Kore, klima ve isi pompasi
- mega — endustriyel pompa
- pimtas — 1977, plastik boru, vana
- vesbo — tesisat

Her markaya: kurulus hikayesi, urun gruplari, Gül-tekin uygulama ornekleri, hizmet linkleri, gorsel imkani ekle.

steps.name: Enrich Group A — Isıtma ve Klima Markaları (demirdokum, eca, general)
Enrich Group B — Pompa, Havuz ve Hidrofor (astral, eds, mega)
Enrich Group C — Elektrik, Elektronik ve İklimlendirme (element, fronius, lg)
Enrich Group D — Tesisat ve Boru Sistemleri (beser, pimtas, vesbo)

log.action: Converted into subtasks: FN-027, FN-028, FN-029

Split-close aborted: Cannot delete task FN-023: still referenced as a dependency by FN-016. Rewrite or remove these dependencies before deleting.. Subtasks created but parent kept alive to avoid orphaning dependents.

log.outcome: This is a comprehensive, well-structured specification for enriching 12 brand pages with structured Turkish content. All referenced files exist on disk, the content structure template is consistent, insertion points are precisely specified, and edge cases (Beser title mismatch, Element brand-generic ambiguity, FN-019 dependency fallback) are explicitly handled. The spec is verifiable with concrete byte-count targets, MDX validation checks, and href verification criteria.
